tooltip.reachcrafting.enabled: Whether any of the mod's features are enabled.
tooltip.reachcrafting.enable_nearby_cont: Controls all ability to pull from and put back items to nearby containers. If disabled, the mod will only use items from the player inventory during crafting.
tooltip.reachcrafting.count_preference: Controls whether craft queuing prioritizes higher-count or lower-count variants when multiple valid choices exist.
tooltip.reachcrafting.redistribute_to_cr: Allow already-filled slots to be rebalanced if other variants are needed to craft more items.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_nearby_crafta: Show the orange recipe-book indicator when cached nearby containers suggest a missing recipe can be crafted from nearby storage.
tooltip.reachcrafting.cache_containers_f: Remember observed nearby container contents to power the recipe-book indicator and speed up Ctrl-assisted nearby searches.
tooltip.reachcrafting.reach_craft_hold_a: When enabled, plain Ctrl recipe clicks are queued while Ctrl is held and replayed one at a time when you release the key.
tooltip.reachcrafting.revolving_craft_ha: Controls how rotating generic recipe-book entries choose which variant of an item to use for crafting (eg: spruce vs oak fence).
tooltip.reachcrafting.input_counter_visi: When to display the queued recipe counter.
tooltip.reachcrafting.reach_craft_close_: Automatically close the vanilla right-click recipe variant overlay after requesting a craft. This allows the crafting grid to be immediately refocused for keyboard input.
tooltip.reachcrafting.reach_craft_prefer: When planning a craft, prioritize using items already in your player inventory before withdrawing from nearby chests.
tooltip.reachcrafting.blacklisted_contai: Ignored container types during scans (separate from in-world blacklist). Can be overridden by the in-world whitelist (in any mode).
tooltip.reachcrafting.auto_focus_search: Automatically focus the recipe book search bar when opening supported crafting grids if the recipe book is visible.
tooltip.reachcrafting.put_pulled_resourc: When you close the crafting grid, automatically return any items pulled from nearby containers back to where they came from.
tooltip.reachcrafting.inventory_2x2_offh: Whether auto craft or scroll to pull can append crafting results into your offhand if it already contains the same item. In 3x3 grids, the offhand will be temporarily moved into your inventory to allow stacking.
option.reachcrafting.eject_items_when_fu: Eject New Items When Inventory Full
tooltip.reachcrafting.eject_items_when_f: When auto craft is on or scroll to pull is true, crafting can continue when inventory is full by dropping (ejecting) results onto the ground.
tooltip.reachcrafting.restore_inventory_: If you exit the crafting grid while items are still in it, attempt to return them to their original slots in your inventory.
tooltip.reachcrafting.in_world_filter_mo: If this setting is not Disabled, hold Ctrl with a container open to see its state and change by clicking the dot. White = whitelist, black = blacklist, gray = unset / neither.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_filter_outlin: Draw a black (for blacklist) or white (for whitelist) wireframe box around filtered containers in the world within 16 blocks.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_total_output_: Display the total number of items that will be produced by crafting everything currently in the grid or being queued.
tooltip.reachcrafting.scroll_to_pull: Choose when Shift + scroll can pull crafted output. The default mode lets Shift + scroll down target a hovered inventory, hotbar, or offhand slot directly.
enum.reachcrafting.scroll_to_pull.while_: While Result Or Inventory Slot Hovered
tooltip.reachcrafting.remember_previous_: Restore the last used search query when opening the recipe book.
tooltip.reachcrafting.type_to_focus_sear: Automatically focus and highlight the search bar when you start typing while the recipe book is visible. Does not apply to functional keys like offhand swap.
tooltip.reachcrafting.auto_craft_capabil:
When enabled, press Alt to toggle Auto Crafting (arrow in result slot). This affects items currently in the grid when first toggled on and other non-manual crafts. 
If bulk is enabled, Alt-click the arrow to temporarily turn on bulk mode. This uncaps the item request limit and performs repeated Auto Crafting. Great for crafting dispensers, honey, etc.
option.reachcrafting.auto_craft_off_afte: Toggle Auto Craft Off After Bulk
tooltip.reachcrafting.auto_craft_off_aft: If enabled, Auto Crafting is completely disabled once a bulk session finishes. If disabled, only bulk mode resets while standard Auto Crafting stays on.
tooltip.reachcrafting.bulk_variant_switc: When disabled, bulk crafting stays on the first resolved recipe variant for the whole session. When enabled, bulk crafting may continue across family variants if the current continuation rules allow it.
tooltip.reachcrafting.auto_craft_handlin: Choose how the Auto Crafting mode is toggled. Toggle keeps the current behavior (Alt key toggles the state on/off). Hold makes Auto Crafting active ONLY while the Alt key is held down.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_craft_aborted: Whether to show a chat message when a crafting session is aborted early by esc or for some other reason.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_bulk_craft_su: Whether to show a chat summary of the total items crafted after a bulk session.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_missing_ingre: Whether to report specifically which ingredients are missing when a craft cannot be completed.
tooltip.reachcrafting.debug_messages_ena: Enable verbose debug logging in chat.
